filtered_articles.title: Walmart Discounts Xbox Series X Consoles Ahead of Massive August Price Hike
filtered_articles.description: Microsoft has officially confirmed another massive Xbox Series X price hike on August 1 in what continues to be an increasingly volatile hardware market. Here are the best deals available on Xbox consoles right now, and why you should consider picking one up sooner rather than later.

filtered_articles.title: Nintendo Switch 2 Finishes First 12 Months on Sale as Second Fastest-Selling Hardware in U.S. History, PS5 Sales Collapse Following Price Rise
filtered_articles.description: The Nintendo Switch 2 has ended its first 12 months on sale as the second fastest-selling hardware in U.S. history.
